brief_html: Sent to clients supporting this packet when a friend is promoted up or demoted down the friend's list.
remarks_html:
Sent to clients supporting this packet when a friend is promoted up or demoted down the friend's list.

The first friend is Entry number 0. When received, all friend entries numbered between the two specified numbers are shifted, resulting in a new 0-based sequential list of friends.

Usually requested with the chat commands /friend promote and /friend demote. These commands support an optional argument specifying a new position to promote (relative to the top) or demote (relative to the bottom) the friend to. This means Entry number and New position could be numbers that aren't sequential with each other.

See [SID_FRIENDSLIST] for more information.
